variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17593 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17593 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17593 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 220.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 200.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 181.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): S194X6, Height 1 (H1): 603.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 588.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 549.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter CF 21 160/1 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17593
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter CF 21 160/1 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17593
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filter secondary elements offer a comprehensive protection against wear / Engine is protected even if the main filter component is replaced or damaged. While the main element is being replaced, extreme or dusty operating conditions can sometimes occur - the secondary element continues to provide optimum protection for a clean air.
specifications: Style: Secondary Element, Dimension A: 187.0 mm, Dimension D: 214.0 mm, Dimension H: 604.0 mm
